"'''Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth'''" was an article written by [[Josh Radke]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]] in [[February]] [[2004]] and [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine|''Star Wars Magazine UK'']]. It detailed the personnel at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], as seen in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].

==Contents==
*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]]
*General [[Pharl McQuarrie/Legends|Pharl McQuarrie]]

*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Beryl Chiffonage]]
*Commander [[Tamizander Rey]]
*Major [[Toryn Farr/Legends|Toryn Farr]]
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tigran Jamiro/Legends|Tigran Jamiro]]
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Romas Navander/Legends|Romas "Lock" Navander]]
*[[Kesin Ommis/Legends|Kesin Ommis]]
*Major [[Shawn Valdez]]
*[[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] [[Trey Callum/Legends|Trey Callum]]
*[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Reyé Hollis/Legends|Reyé Hollis]]
*Lieutenant [[Cal Alder/Legends|Cal Alder]]
*[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Vildar Blin]]
*Corporal [[Corman Quien]]
*Captain [[Wyron Serper/Legends|Wyron Serper]]

*[[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]]
*[[FX-7/Legends|FX-7]]

==Continuity==
*The entry for [[Pharl McQuarrie]] incorrectly states that he did not appear in the finished film and was only pictured on a [[Decipher]] card.
*[[Kem Monnon/Legends|Kem Monnon]], [[Jeroen Webb]], [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]] and [[Palo Torshan]] are referenced in the text, but did not receive individual entries.
